description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, featuring a combination of dark wood and white exterior finishes. The front facade includes a double garage with a black door, a covered entryway with two potted plants, and large windows on both levels. The upper floor has a balcony with a glass railing, while the rear of the house features expansive windows and a glass door leading to the backyard. The side elevations show a mix of window sizes and a clean, geometric design with minimal ornamentation. The overall structure is boxy and angular, emphasizing horizontal and vertical lines typical of contemporary architecture. The house sits on a paved base, suggesting integration with an urban sidewalk or driveway.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat and sloped roof, dark wood and white exterior, large windows, and a double garage. Features include a balcony, potted plants at the entry, and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry with potted plants, balcony above, and a mix of dark wood and white finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, wood paneling on the upper story, and a row of windows on the lower level.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows, a glass door, and a single potted plant, emphasizing the house's openness to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying more windows and the continuation of the white and black color scheme, with the paved base visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, two potted plants, a small covered porch, and a balcony above.
